articles.title: UniClawBench: A Universal Benchmark for Proactive Agents on Real-World Tasks

However, existing benchmarks struggle to evaluate such agents effectively, as they
articles.summary: 提出UniClawBench通用基准，面向真实世界任务中主动代理的评估。弥补现有基准难以测试能操作工具并辅助用户的代理的不足，提供标准化测试环境与评价指标。

articles.title: Enhancing In-context Panoramic Generation via Geometric-aware Pretraining
articles.excerpt: In this work, we present Canvas360, a two-stage framework for in-context panoramic generation that combines geometry-aware pretraining with downstream task-specific fine-tuning. articles.summary: 提出Canvas360两阶段框架用于上下文全景生成，结合几何感知预训练与下游微调。针对高质量训练数据缺失，提出Canvas360-Scan数据合成方法，显著提升全景图像一致性。

articles.title: Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench: Testing the Limits of Agents on Long-Horizon Terminal Tasks with Dense Reward-Based Grading
articles.excerpt: AI agents have become capable of autonomously completing short, well-specified tasks. However, existing terminal benchmarks largely focus on simple problems that finish within minutes and are evaluated only by their final outcome. This setup overlooks intermediate progress and partial solutions, yie
articles.summary: 提出Long-Horizon-Terminal-Bench，采用密集奖励评分评估代理在长程终端任务中的表现。不仅考核最终结果，还跟踪中间进展与部分解决方案，突破现有基准对简单短时任务的局限。

articles.title: Jet-Long: Efficient Long-Context Extension with Dynamic Bifocal RoPE

articles.summary: 提出Jet-Long，通过动态双焦旋转位置编码（Dynamic Bifocal RoPE）高效扩展LLM上下文能力。无需额外训练便可处理超出预训练窗口数十倍的输入，适用于RAG、代码仓库与智能体工作流。

articles.title: Single-Rollout Asynchronous Optimization for Agentic Reinforcement Learning
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning (RL) is becoming increasingly important for post-training large language models (LLMs). articles.summary: 提出单轨迹异步优化方法用于智能体强化学习后训练LLM。克服同步批处理在长程任务中的低效，实现更高效的异步学习，提升agentic RL训练速度与性能。

articles.title: OpenCoF: Learning to Reason Through Video Generation
articles.excerpt: Reasoning has become a core capability for large models, especially when reliable decisions require understanding logical consequences. articles.summary: 提出OpenCoF，通过视频生成学习推理。不同于传统链式思维，推理在时域连续帧中展开，利用视频生成模型理解逻辑后果，为可靠决策提供新范式。

articles.title: Scalable Visual Pretraining for Language Intelligence
articles.excerpt: The rapid progress of large foundation models has been driven predominantly by pretraining on large-scale text corpora. articles.summary: 提出可扩展视觉预训练提升语言智能。利用图表、公式与页面布局中的视觉知识，弥补纯文本预训练对视觉信息的缺失，增强大模型对多模态知识的理解能力。

articles.title: CineMobile: On-Device Image-to-Video Diffusion for Cinematic Camera Motion Generation
articles.excerpt: The growing demand for image-to-video creation on mobile devices has increasingly focused on cinematic motion effects like bullet time, dolly zoom, slow motion, etc. While Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) exhibit strong performance in video generation, their large parameter sizes and multi-step iterati
articles.summary: 提出CineMobile，面向移动设备的图像到视频扩散模型，生成电影级相机运动效果（如子弹时间、推拉变焦）。通过模型压缩与多步蒸馏，在DiT基础上实现本地高效运行。

articles.title: Automating the Design of Embodied Agent Architectures
articles.excerpt: Embodied agents are typically built as hand-designed compositions of perception, memory, planning, and action modules. articles.summary: 提出自动化设计具身代理架构方法，探索感知、记忆、规划与动作模块的设计空间。无需人工直觉，自动选择信息存储与处理方式，降低架构设计成本。

articles.title: RoboDojo: A Unified Sim-and-Real Benchmark for Comprehensive Evaluation of Generalist Robot Manipulation Policies
articles.excerpt: Generalist robot manipulation policies have advanced rapidly, yet existing benchmarks remain limited in systematically evaluating their capabilities. articles.summary: 提出RoboDojo，统一的仿真与真实基准，全面评估通用机器人操作策略。涵盖多种长程、技能多样任务，在仿真与真实场景中提供系统化评价。

articles.title: Remember When It Matters: Proactive Memory Agent for Long-Horizon Agents
articles.excerpt: In long-horizon tasks, decision-relevant state is often scattered across an expanding trajectory, while the action agent must surface it and act. articles.summary: 提出主动记忆代理（Proactive Memory Agent），在长程任务中主动记忆关键决策状态。自动提取任务需求、环境事实与先前尝试等信息，避免被上下文窗口淹没。

articles.title: Sparse Delta Memory: Scaling the State of Linear RNNs through Sparsity
articles.excerpt: Linear attention models allow a fixed state size and a fixed amount of compute per token. articles.summary: 提出Sparse Delta Memory，通过稀疏性扩展线性RNN的状态大小。在不增加每token计算量的前提下显著提升长程召回能力，缩小与softmax Transformer在长上下文上的差距。

articles.title: Video Generation Models are General-Purpose Vision Learners
articles.excerpt: Driven by next-token prediction, NLP shifted from task-specific models into powerful generalist foundation models. articles.title: 南海仲裁十周年 14国联合发声

articles.title: 研究：美国若对中国造船舶征收港口费 德国可能受益
articles.url: https://www.dw.com/zh/研究：美国若对中国造船舶征收港口费-德国可能受益/a-77878816?maca=chi-rss-chi-all-1127-rdf
articles.excerpt: 德国经济研究所（DIW）做出的一项研究发现，美国针对中国制造的商用船舶拟征收的港口费，可能让德国受益。德国对美出口额可能会增长约2%。主要原因在于，德国货运船队对中国制造船舶的依赖度较低，意味着德国出口商有望从受冲击的竞争对手手中夺取市场份额。
